title: Zynga Poker: Texas Holdem Game
notes:
NEW: Zynga Poker Cup! It’s your season to score! Prepare to represent your country in the ultimate poker showdown. Get ready to take your shot and win big!
Buddy Bonus: We’ve upgraded gifting! Having more buddies now means bigger rewards and massive multipliers every time you spin!
Experience smoother gameplay with various bug fixes and performance improvements
